title: Google Is Expanding Access To Its Gemini Spark Agentic AI Assistant
excerpt: Gemini Spark is now available to more users.
content_html:
More Google AI Pro and Ultra users will now have access to Spark.

Primakov/Shutterstock

Google is making Gemini Spark, the agentic AI assistant it announced at this year's I/O developer conference, available to more people. Unfortunately, they still don't include free users. In the US, Spark is rolling out to everyone paying $20 a month for Google AI Pro. It's also rolling out globally to Google AI Ultra users, who are paying between $100 to $200 a month for their subscription...unless they're in the European Economic Area, Switzerland, the UK and Nigeria. Those who can now access Spark with this expansion may want to check if it also comes with local language support. 

Spark is powered by Gemini 3.5 and is deeply integrated into Google's Workspace apps. Users can assign tasks to it by going to the Spark page, either via the sidebar on a computer or by tapping on the option under menu on mobile. From there, they can type in the tasks they want Spark to do. They can tell Spark, for instance, to check their emails and calendar schedules every morning and then let them know what to prioritize. Spark can also automatically create draft responses for when emails from a particular person hit the user's inbox, or summarize lengthy email threads. Users can use Spark to create detailed reports in Google Docs from meeting notes and emails, as well. As these are only a few possible tasks for Spark, users can check out Google's support pages for more information.

blocks.html_en: More Google AI Pro and Ultra users will now have access to Spark.

sentences.en: More Google AI Pro and Ultra users will now have access to Spark.
sentences.zh: 现在，更多 Google AI Pro 和 Ultra 用户将可以访问 Spark。

blocks.html_en: Google is making Gemini Spark, the agentic AI assistant it announced at this year's I/O developer conference, available to more people. Unfortunately, they still don't include free users. In the US, Spark is rolling out to everyone paying $20 a month for Google AI Pro. It's also rolling out globally to Google AI Ultra users, who are paying between $100 to $200 a month for their subscription...unless they're in the European Economic Area, Switzerland, the UK and Nigeria. Those who can now access Spark with this expansion may want to check if it also comes with local language support.

sentences.en: Google is making Gemini Spark, the agentic AI assistant it announced at this year's I/O developer conference, available to more people.
sentences.zh: 谷歌正在让更多人使用它在今年的 I/O 开发者大会上推出的代理人工智能助手 Gemini Spark。

sentences.en: Unfortunately, they still don't include free users.
sentences.zh: 不幸的是，他们仍然不包括免费用户。

sentences.en: In the US, Spark is rolling out to everyone paying $20 a month for Google AI Pro.
sentences.zh: 在美国，Spark 正在向每月支付 20 美元购买 Google AI Pro 的所有人推出。

sentences.en: It's also rolling out globally to Google AI Ultra users, who are paying between $100 to $200 a month for their subscription...unless they're in the European Economic Area, Switzerland, the UK and Nigeria.
sentences.zh: 它还在全球范围内向 Google AI Ultra 用户推出，这些用户每月支付 100 至 200 美元的订阅费用……除非他们位于欧洲经济区、瑞士、英国和尼日利亚。

sentences.en: Those who can now access Spark with this expansion may want to check if it also comes with local language support.
sentences.zh: 那些现在可以通过此扩展访问 Spark 的人可能想检查它是否也提供本地语言支持。

blocks.html_en: Spark is powered by Gemini 3.5 and is deeply integrated into Google's Workspace apps. Users can assign tasks to it by going to the Spark page, either via the sidebar on a computer or by tapping on the option under menu on mobile. From there, they can type in the tasks they want Spark to do. They can tell Spark, for instance, to check their emails and calendar schedules every morning and then let them know what to prioritize. Spark can also automatically create draft responses for when emails from a particular person hit the user's inbox, or summarize lengthy email threads. Users can use Spark to create detailed reports in Google Docs from meeting notes and emails, as well. As these are only a few possible tasks for Spark, users can check out Google's support pages for more information.

sentences.en: Spark is powered by Gemini 3.5 and is deeply integrated into Google's Workspace apps.
sentences.zh: Spark 由 Gemini 3.5 提供支持，并深度集成到 Google 的 Workspace 应用程序中。

sentences.en: Users can assign tasks to it by going to the Spark page, either via the sidebar on a computer or by tapping on the option under menu on mobile.
sentences.zh: 用户可以通过计算机上的侧边栏或点击移动设备上菜单下的选项，进入 Spark 页面为其分配任务。

sentences.en: From there, they can type in the tasks they want Spark to do.
sentences.zh: 从那里，他们可以输入他们希望 Spark 执行的任务。

sentences.en: They can tell Spark, for instance, to check their emails and calendar schedules every morning and then let them know what to prioritize.
sentences.zh: 例如，他们可以告诉 Spark 每天早上检查他们的电子邮件和日历安排，然后让他们知道要优先考虑什么。

sentences.en: Spark can also automatically create draft responses for when emails from a particular person hit the user's inbox, or summarize lengthy email threads.
sentences.zh: Spark 还可以在特定人员的电子邮件到达用户收件箱时自动创建草稿响应，或总结冗长的电子邮件线程。

sentences.en: Users can use Spark to create detailed reports in Google Docs from meeting notes and emails, as well.
sentences.zh: 用户还可以使用 Spark 根据会议记录和电子邮件在 Google 文档中创建详细报告。

sentences.en: As these are only a few possible tasks for Spark, users can check out Google's support pages for more information.
sentences.zh: 由于这些只是 Spark 的几个可能的任务，用户可以查看 Google 的支持页面以获取更多信息。

content_html_zh:
现在，更多 Google AI Pro 和 Ultra 用户将可以访问 Spark。

普里马科夫/Shutterstock

谷歌正在让更多人使用它在今年的 I/O 开发者大会上推出的代理人工智能助手 Gemini Spark。 不幸的是，他们仍然不包括免费用户。 在美国，Spark 正在向每月支付 20 美元购买 Google AI Pro 的所有人推出。 它还在全球范围内向 Google AI Ultra 用户推出，这些用户每月支付 100 至 200 美元的订阅费用……除非他们位于欧洲经济区、瑞士、英国和尼日利亚。 那些现在可以通过此扩展访问 Spark 的人可能想检查它是否也提供本地语言支持。

Spark 由 Gemini 3.5 提供支持，并深度集成到 Google 的 Workspace 应用程序中。 用户可以通过计算机上的侧边栏或点击移动设备上菜单下的选项，进入 Spark 页面为其分配任务。 从那里，他们可以输入他们希望 Spark 执行的任务。 例如，他们可以告诉 Spark 每天早上检查他们的电子邮件和日历安排，然后让他们知道要优先考虑什么。 Spark 还可以在特定人员的电子邮件到达用户收件箱时自动创建草稿响应，或总结冗长的电子邮件线程。 用户还可以使用 Spark 根据会议记录和电子邮件在 Google 文档中创建详细报告。 由于这些只是 Spark 的几个可能的任务，用户可以查看 Google 的支持页面以获取更多信息。
